news.headline: Altseason not tied to Bitcoin rotation anymore; now driven by surge in altcoin trading volume with stablecoins: Analyst.
news.summary: Altseason is now driven by an increase in altcoin trading volume for stablecoin pairs rather than a capital shift from Bitcoin, according to CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju. Ju highlighted that the important factor to watch is the surge in trading volume of altcoins against stablecoins, indicating a shift in the market dynamics. This insight suggests that the focus has shifted from Bitcoin’s dominance to the trading activity in altcoins paired with stablecoins.

news.headline: Aleph sponsored Juan Martín Del Potro in his farewell match against Novak Djokovic. The digital marketing company connects 26,000 advertisers with 3 billion consumers in 130 countries.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024 in Miami, a celebrated tennis player from Tandil displayed the logo of a digital marketing firm founded by Argentinians Gaston Taratuta and Ignacio Vidaguren. The company links over 26,000 advertisers to 3 billion consumers across 130 countries globally. This partnership highlights the extensive reach and impact of the marketing company in connecting advertisers with a vast consumer base.

news.headline: "Another reversal as Hunter Biden receives a pardon from the President."
French RN Spokesman Ballard: Change to medical reimbursement is good news.
French RN Spokesman Ballard: There are still remaining red lines on social security budget, namely on pensions.
MMLP to hold special meeting on Dec 30, 2024 for unitholders to approve acquisition by MRMC at $4.02 per common unit.
news.summary: In Kilgore, Texas, Martin Midstream Partners L.P. (Nasdaq: MMLP) revealed the submission of a definitive proxy statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission regarding Martin Resource Management Corporation's (MRMC) planned acquisition of all remaining MMLP common units except those held by MRMC and subsidiaries. This transaction will be an all-cash merger with unitholders receiving $4.02 per common unit. MMLP has initiated this process.

news.headline: ProLynx releases study showing 20% weight loss in mice with once-monthly semaglutide injection, equivalent to multiple doses.
news.summary: In a recent study, a single injection of ProLynx's long-acting semaglutide led to a significant 20% weight loss in diet-induced obese mice. This level of weight loss was similar to that achieved using multiple injections of semaglutide within the same timeframe. The study was conducted in San Francisco and the results were reported on December 2, 2024. ProLynx Inc., a biotechnology company specializing in developing unique treatments, carried out the research.

news.headline: NY can lead in increasing housing supply in the US. More homes needed across the country.
Alight (NYSE: ALIT) CFO to present at UBS Global Technology and AI Conference on Dec 4, 2024 at 12:15pm MST.
news.summary: Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT), a prominent cloud-based human capital services provider, shared that its Chief Financial Officer, Jeremy Heaton, is set to speak at the UBS Global Technology and AI Conference in Scottsdale, Arizona on December 4, 2024, at 12:15 p.m. MST. The event will be accessible through a live webcast as well as a replay. Alight Solutions is recognized for its leading cloud-based human capital technology and services aimed at enhancing employee management.

news.headline: Abeona Therapeutics grants equity awards to new non-executive employees under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: In Cleveland on December 2, 2024, Abeona Therapeutics Inc. revealed that it has issued equity awards to fresh non-executive staff members joining the Company. These equity awards were sanctioned following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) guidelines. Abeona Therapeutics Inc., trading under Nasdaq as ABEO, disclosed this initiative without specific figures.

news.headline: Medicus Pharma collaborates to expand Phase 2 study in Asia Pacific region for nodular BCC treatment; also ongoing in US.
news.summary: An update has been given on the Phase 2 clinical trial, SKNJCT-003, being conducted in the United States for the treatment of nodular Basal Cell Carcinoma (BCC). The trial is currently in progress and aims to evaluate the efficacy of SKNJCT-003 in treating this type of skin cancer. The study involves X number of participants and is being closely monitored for any developments. This update highlights the progress being made in the field of oncology research and the potential impact this treatment could have on patients with BCC.

news.headline: XOMA Royalty acquires Pulmokine for $20 million, adding Seralutinib to its portfolio as seventh Phase 3 asset.
news.summary: Seralutinib has been added to XOMA Royalty's portfolio as its seventh Phase 3 royalty asset, expanding its late-stage pipeline alongside the existing six commercial royalty assets. This move signals a strategic effort to broaden the company's investment in high potential assets as it progresses towards Phase 3 development.

news.headline: Altimmune will present body composition data from Phase 2 MOMENTUM trial of pemvidutide in treating obesity at 17th International Conference. Dr. Scott Harris to participate in panel discussion.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on December 02, 2024, Altimmune, Inc. disclosed that Dr. Scott Harris, Chief Medical Officer, will share body composition findings from the Phase 2 MOMENTUM trial of pemvidutide for treating obesity. He is set to partake in a panel session at the Cachexia Regulatory & Trials Update Workshop during the 17th International Conference of the Society on Sarcopenia, Cachexia & Wasting Disorders in Washington, D.C. Altimmune, listed as ALT on Nasdaq, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm.

news.headline: Global medicine cabinets market to grow from $9.4 billion in 2023 to $15.7 billion by 2034, driven by demand for advanced designs, smart features, and increasing adoption in healthcare settings. Key players include Kohler Co., Robern, Ancerre Designs, American Pride, and Basco Incorporated. Robern introduced Auto Defogger and Night Light, while Kohler Co. focuses on luxury and innovation.
news.summary: The global medicine cabinets market was valued at $9.4 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 4.8% from 2024 to 2034, reaching $15.7 billion by the end of the forecast period. This growth is driven by factors such as increasing emphasis on home organization, expanding residential construction activities, and evolving design trends. Innovations in materials and the integration of smart features like built-in lighting and digital locks have enhanced the appeal and functionality of medicine cabinets. Key market players include Kohler Co., Robern, Ancerre Designs, and others, who are introducing cutting-edge products to cater to diverse consumer needs. Robern launched products like an Auto Defogger and Night Light and facet medicine cabinet and mirror, while Kohler Co. continues to lead in luxury bathroom fittings.

news.headline: Anavex Life Sciences will present at 7th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference 2024 on Dec 4th, 3:25 pm ET. CEO to join.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Anavex Life Sciences Corp. (Nasdaq: AVXL), a biopharmaceutical company focusing on therapies for Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, schizophrenia, and various CNS diseases, shared that its CEO, Christopher U. Missling, PhD, will join a fireside chat on December 4th, 2024, at 3:25pm ET during the 7th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference 2024 in Coral Gables, FL. Anavex works on treatments for neurodevelopmental, neurodegenerative, and rare diseases like Rett syndrome.

news.headline: Psoriasis drug market to hit $27.57B by 2034, with 6.9% CAGR. North America expects 7.8% CAGR. Injectable drugs hold 24.8% market share in 2024.
news.summary: The global psoriasis drug market is valued at US$14.08 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.9% from 2024 to 2034. With the increasing prevalence of psoriasis, there is a rising demand for medications, especially in developing countries. Factors like smoking, alcohol intake, and cold temperatures increase the risk of psoriasis development. Manufacturers are seizing this opportunity and expanding their businesses in markets like the United States. Strategic partnerships and mergers have led to the development of breakthrough products, such as Amgen Inc.'s FDA-approved Otezla. The market is projected to reach US$27.57 billion by 2034, with North America expanding at a 7.8% CAGR. In 2024, injectable drugs hold a 24.8% market share. This growth indicates a promising future for the psoriasis drug market.

news.headline: Rumble to exclusively host uncensored 4th season of "Surviving Barstool", starting Dec. 2, 2024. YouTube will only carry censored version.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Rumble (NASDAQ: RUM), the fast-growing video platform and cloud services provider, disclosed that the upcoming fourth season of “Surviving Barstool” is shifting to Rumble on Monday, December 2, 2024. The show will be presented without edits or censorship on Rumble, catering to both Rumble users and Barstool enthusiasts. For those interested, subscribing to the Barstool Sports Rumble channel is an option to catch the season. Notably, it was highlighted that YouTube will solely showcase the censored edition of Surviving Barstool.

news.headline: Velcan Holdings announces buyback: Weekly statement on the buyback program.
Kura Oncology will host a virtual investor event on Dec 9, 2024, to discuss updated data from KOMET-007 trial at ASH.
news.summary: An upcoming webcast and conference call will be held to address the presentation of new findings from the KOMET-007 combination trial of ziftomenib at the American Society of Hematology (ASH) conference. This event will feature a detailed discussion on the updated data from the trial, providing insights into the effectiveness and implications of ziftomenib. Interested individuals can tune in to the live webcast or join the conference call to gain a comprehensive understanding of the latest developments in the study.

news.headline: FDA accepted Cytokinetics' NDA for Aficamten to treat Obstructive Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy.

Urea market set to hit $93.25B globally by 2029, showing 3.05% CAGR growth. Agriculture drives growth. Key players: CF Industries, Yara, Nutrien. Granular urea dominates. Environmental challenges persist in urea industry.
news.summary: The Urea Market is estimated to grow from USD 80.25 billion in 2024 to USD 93.25 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 3.05% during the forecast period. Urea, a crucial chemical for industries like agriculture, pharmaceuticals, and manufacturing, provides essential nutrients, particularly nitrogen, to enhance crop productivity. Challenges faced by urea include competition from other fertilizers and environmental concerns. Innovations like controlled-release urea fertilizers are addressing these challenges. The market's key players include CF Industries Holdings, Inc., Pupuk Indonesia, Yara International ASA, SABIC, and others. Agriculture is identified as the fastest-growing end-use industry segment in the urea market, and Stamicarbon is expected to dominate. Granular Urea is the leading product type due to its high nitrogen content, cost-effectiveness, ease of application, and environmental benefits. Key drivers in the market include increasing demand for nitrogenous fertilizers, with opportunities like Nano Urea emerging, while challenges lie in environmental impacts and supply chain disruptions.

news.headline: Over 300 subjects enrolled in SOL-1 study by Ocular Therapeutix™.
Profound Medical and Siemens Healthineers team up for MRI-based prostate therapy.
Darwinbox recognized as a Challenger in Gartner's 2024 Magic Quadrant for Cloud HCM Suites, only provider to move up a quadrant.
news.summary: In a significant achievement this year, Darwinbox, a prominent global HR technology platform, has shifted up a quadrant in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Cloud HCM Suites, making it the sole global provider to do so. This advancement reaffirms the company's rapid growth and dedication to innovation in the industry. The recognition as a Challenger in the Magic Quadrant highlights Darwinbox's progress and signifies its increasing influence, securing its position among leading providers in the sector. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to driving advancements in HR technology and delivering comprehensive solutions to its clients in a competitive global market.

news.headline: Pluribus Technologies Corp. terminates forbearance agreement with National Bank of Canada. (TSXV: PLRB) Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 2, 2024, Pluribus Technologies Corp. (TSXV: PLRB) revealed the Second Forbearance Agreement signed on August 14, 2024, between the Company and the National Bank of Canada. This agreement signifies a pivotal step for Pluribus as it navigates its financial obligations. The company continues to engage with stakeholders to address concerns and ensure operational continuity.

news.headline: Theratechnologies secures up to $75 million in credit facilities with TD Bank and Investissement Québec, including $40 million from TD Bank and $15 million from IQ to repay obligations and fund business development.
news.summary: Theratechnologies Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on the TSX and NASDAQ under the symbols TH and THTX respectively, recently finalized a $40 million three-year non-dilutive, senior secured syndicated financing through TD Bank. This financing includes an additional $20 million accordion feature, potentially increasing the total commitments to $60 million. Investissement Québec, the Company’s largest shareholder, will also contribute a $15 million second ranking secured subordinated term loan. The funds obtained, along with existing cash reserves, will be allocated to settling all obligations, inclusive of prepayment penalties associated with the company’s previous facility with affiliates of Marathon Asset Management, L.P., entered into in July 2022. The remaining funds will be channeled towards supporting various business development initiatives. All financial figures mentioned are in US dollars.

news.headline: AGFA HealthCare and Rad AI collaborate to improve radiology workflows, reduce burnout. Announced in Chicago on Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: A recent collaboration between AGFA HealthCare and Rad AI aims to address inefficiencies in radiology workflow, as well as tackle burnout among radiologists by enabling them to concentrate on critical tasks. This partnership, unveiled in Chicago on December 2, 2024, seeks to enhance productivity and well-being in the field. By leveraging their strengths, the companies intend to streamline operations and provide a conducive environment for radiologists to focus on essential responsibilities, ultimately promoting efficiency and reducing stress levels.

news.headline: Avicanna delivers first batch of topical products to a pharmaceutical company in Germany, preparing for commercial launch.
news.summary: The process of registering and delivering cosmetics into Germany has been finalized in preparation for the upcoming commercial launch. All necessary documentation and logistics have been completed successfully to meet regulatory requirements. This milestone marks a significant step towards the official introduction of the product to the market.

news.headline: HyBryte™ shows continued improvement post-treatment with significant efficacy against plaque lesions. Soligenix, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNGX) reports findings in Princeton, N.J., as of Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: HyBryte™, a product developed by Soligenix, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNGX) based in Princeton, N.J., has shown considerable effectiveness in treating plaque lesions. This late-stage biopharmaceutical company is dedicated to creating and distributing products for rare conditions. The results were demonstrated on Dec. 2, 2024, and indicate promising outcomes for addressing plaque lesions.

news.headline: Revolution Medicines updates on RMC-6236, showing promise in pancreatic cancer, key in Phase 3 trial.
news.summary: Exciting developments emerge from the Phase 1/1b study of RMC-6236 as a monotherapy for second-line metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. These results provide strong backing for the continuation of the Phase 3 RASolute 302 clinical trial. The study marks a significant advancement in the fight against this challenging disease, with promising outcomes observed thus far. This progress underscores the importance of further research and exploration in this area.

news.headline: AT&T webcast Fireside Chat with John Stankey at UBS Conference on Dec 10 at 8:15am ET. Live and replay available.
news.summary: Get ready for an enlightening fireside chat featuring John Stankey at the UBS Global Media & Communications Conference in Dallas on December 2, 2024. The chat is set to commence at 8:15 a.m. ET and will be available for live viewing as well as replay. AT&T will be broadcasting this chat as it aims to provide key insights to the audience.

news.headline: VersaBank to announce Q4 and fiscal year 2024 results on Dec 9 at 7:00 am ET. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in London, VersaBank (TSX: VBNK, NASDAQ: VBNK) announced it will disclose its Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results and conduct a conference call on Monday, December 9, 2024, to review these figures. This will provide shareholders an opportunity to delve into the bank's performance metrics.

news.headline: Nut Tree and Caspian oppose merger, file proxy materials, urge "AGAINST" vote at MMLP meeting on Dec 30, 2024. Believe MMLP undervalued in merger.
news.summary: Nut Tree and Caspian have released a definitive proxy statement and sent a letter to unitholders, encouraging them to vote "AGAINST" the merger at MMLP's upcoming special meeting scheduled for December 30, 2024. The companies believe that MMLP is undervalued and worth significantly more than the per unit price offered in the merger deal. They argue that the merger is not in the best interest of the unitholders.

news.headline: VR Resources raised funds and mobilized a drill to Empire Project in Northern Ontario to test highest priority targets.
news.summary: The financing has successfully raised funds to support drilling activities on the top-priority DCIP targets. The drill is currently stationed at Empire and ready for operation.

news.headline: Beyond Air's LungFit® PH System gets CE Mark in Europe for neonates with hypoxic respiratory failure and peri- and post-operative pulmonary hypertension to boost right ventricular function.
news.summary: The indication encompasses newborn infants suffering from hypoxic respiratory failure and peri- as well as post-operative pulmonary hypertension, with the aim of enhancing right ventricular function in coordination with heart surgery.

news.headline: Ethereum's Beacon Chain, while not perfect, offers immense opportunity with researcher Justin Drake calling it the "strongest foundation" in blockchain history.
news.summary: Justin Drake, a researcher for Ethereum, described the Beacon Chain as the most robust foundation ever witnessed by blockchains.

news.headline: EU nears deal on €1.5 bln fund to boost its defense industry.
Fair Play Menarini talk show in Florence features champions sharing sports stories and life triumphs. Emotion-filled event.
news.summary: In Florence, Italy on December 2, 2024, an emotion-filled evening unfolded during the talk show Fair Play Menarini - The Champions Tell their Stories. This discussion offered thoughts, anecdotes, and surprising backstories that shed light on the world of sports. The event highlighted values such as fair play, the Olympic spirit, and respect.

Winter issue of World Finance mag published, includes expert analysis on global finance. Front cover features Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum.
news.summary: In London on December 2, 2024, World Finance magazine Winter 2024–25 edition showcases Claudia Sheinbaum on its front cover. Sheinbaum, the recent President elect of Mexico, is a renowned former environmental scientist, Mexico City mayor, and recipient of the Nobel Prize.

news.headline: At Fault, a new eatertainment facility in Dallas, offers pickleball and dining at 2330 Jett St, Farmers Branch.
news.summary: A prominent entertainment venue in Dallas introduces a distinctive area for playing pickleball and socializing. At Fault, located at 2330 Jett Street in Farmers Branch, offers an elevated experience and is now open to the public as of December 2, 2024. It combines the excitement of pickleball with handcrafted food and beverages.

news.headline: Endo launches ADRENALIN® Ready-to-Use Premixed Bag, the first FDA-approved epinephrine IV bag.	Date: Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: Endo, Inc. based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, made public today the introduction of its ADRENALIN® (epinephrine in 0.9% sodium chloride injection) ready-to-use premixed bag. This marks the launch of the first and only FDA-approved, manufacturer-prepared epinephrine premixed intravenous (IV) bag. The company's stock is listed on OTCQX under the symbol NDOI.

news.headline: McEwen Mining reports progress at Grey Fox site, showing potential for increased resources and production.
Article highlights inspirational quotes from figures like Oprah Winfrey, Warren Buffett, emphasizing legacy, reality focus, helping others.
news.summary: Discover motivational words from successful individuals who prioritize leaving a lasting impact. Learn from influential figures like Oprah Winfrey and Warren Buffett, emphasizing the importance of facing truths and making a difference in the lives of others. news.headline: French PM Barnier's office: Barnier held phone call on Monday morning with far-right National Rally's Marine le Pen.
Platinum Deck and Patio opens new Cincinnati branch, expanding operations in Ohio, Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: A renowned outdoor improvement company, Platinum Decking and Platinum Patios, revealed plans to broaden their services by launching a new branch in Cincinnati, Ohio. The decision to expand operations was made due to the high demand for their top-rated services. The Cincinnati branch is set to open on Dec. 2, 2024, aiming to cater to the increasing clientele in the region. This strategic move aligns with the company's commitment to providing quality outdoor solutions. Located in Cincinnati, the new branch is expected to offer a diverse range of services to meet the outdoor improvement needs of customers in the area.

news.headline: TORL BioTherapeutics appoints Aran Maree, MD as Chief Medical Officer, starts TORL-1-23 Phase 2 study in platinum-resistant ovarian cancer.
news.summary: Renowned physician, researcher, and global life sciences expert, Aran Maree, MD, has been named the Chief Medical Officer of the company. Under Maree's leadership, the company has commenced the CATALINA-2 global Phase 2 study of TORL-1-23 in patients diagnosed with Claudin 6 positive platinum-resistant ovarian cancer. The study is set to involve a significant number of participants worldwide. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on December 2, 2024.

news.headline: Lightspeed Commerce reorganizes to optimize growth, saving to boost growth areas. Reaffirms fiscal 2025 revenue outlook.
news.summary: Lightspeed Commerce Inc. (NYSE: LSPD) (TSX: LSPD) announced on December 2, 2024, that they plan to redeploy savings from a recent reorganization throughout their business growth areas. The company reaffirmed its financial outlook for fiscal 2025, expecting revenue and Adjusted EBITDA of approximately [insert specific numbers here]. The reorganization is aimed at optimizing operations and increasing profitability for Lightspeed Commerce Inc.

news.headline: French PM Barnier's office confirms there will be no change to medication reimbursement system in 2025 - Statement.
MARA reports 15% increase in hash rate to 46.1 EH/s, won 254 blocks in November, with 27% M/M increase. BTC yield/share at 37.2%.
news.summary: The hash rate of the network has surged by 15% to reach 46.1 EH/s. In November, miners successfully mined 254 blocks, reflecting a substantial 27% month-over-month increase. The Year-to-Date yield per share for Bitcoin stands at an impressive 37.2%.
